check_deleted_flag_and_datetime.name: check_deleted_flag_and_datetime
check_deleted_flag_and_datetime.value: (NOT deleted_flag) OR (deleted_flag AND (deleted_datetime IS NOT NULL))

group_deleted_flag_datetime_consistent.name: group_deleted_flag_datetime_consistent
group_deleted_flag_datetime_consistent.value: (deleted_flag AND (deleted_datetime IS NOT NULL)) OR ((NOT deleted_flag) AND (deleted_datetime IS NULL))

cannot_verify_expired_certificate.name: cannot_verify_expired_certificate
cannot_verify_expired_certificate.value: (expires_at IS NULL) OR (expires_at >= statement_timestamp()) OR (NOT verified)

no_self_supervision.name: no_self_supervision
no_self_supervision.value: (supervisor_user_id IS NULL) OR (NOT ((student_user_id = supervisor_user_id) AND (supervisor_user_id IS NOT NULL)))
